data.title: Donald Trump Earns $1.2B From Crypto
data.description:
The post Donald Trump Earns $1. According to a Forbes report published on June 5, Trump’s net worth has now reached $5. 6 billion, with nearly half of his liquid assets linked to cryptocurrencies
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/donald-trump-net-worth-boosted-by-crypto/

data.title: Analysis: Trump's second son's official announcement of cooperation with TRUMP failed to drive prices up, and the community questioned his ability to "call orders"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump's second son Eric Trump announced this morning that he has reached a cooperation with the Meme coin project TRUMP and WLFI and plans to hold a large number of TRUMP tokens in its long-term treasury. After the news came out, the price of TRUMP briefly increased by 6.4%, but then quickly fell back, so some crypto communities questioned that the news failed to effectively promote a stronger price increase. Analyst Pluid said: "Eric Trump's 'calling' did not make TRUMP rise, which is definitely not a good sign." (Cointelgraph)

data.title: Ethereum's Role in Stablecoins and DeFi Gains Attention Amid Market Developments
data.description: According to Odaily, Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, recently shared his views on the X platform, highlighting Ethereum's foundational role in stablecoins, risk-weighted assets, DeFi, NFTs, decentralized social networks, and prediction markets. Despite these contributions, Tomaino noted that the market often overlooks Ethereum's achievements and that the Ethereum community sometimes lacks a competitive spirit. However, with Ethereum's on-chain activity reaching historic highs, Circle's public listing pushing stablecoins into the mainstream, and a new collaboration between X and Polymarket, Ethereum is gradually balancing creativity with competitiveness.

data.title: Hut 8 Warns Against Fraudulent Activities in Brazil, South Korea, and Hong Kong
data.description: According to PANews, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 has issued a warning about fraudulent activities involving individuals impersonating company representatives in Brazil, South Korea, and Hong Kong. The company clarified that it currently does not operate or have authorized representatives in these regions. Hut 8 urged community members to remain vigilant and cautious to avoid falling victim to scams.

data.title: Tether's custodial wallet deposited 200 BTC to Binance 8 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the on-chain analysis platform @lookonchain, the Tether custodial wallet deposited 200 BTC worth about $20.88 million to Binance 8 hours ago. Since the BTC price rebounded to $100,000 on May 9, the wallet has deposited 1,650 BTC (about $174.7 million) to Binance.

data.title: Mempool Warns Against Phishing Scams Using Its Logo
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mempool, the official Bitcoin memory pool and blockchain explorer, has announced that it does not offer any 'crypto recovery services.' The project warns that any phishing emails claiming to be from 'mempool recovery' and using its logo are fraudulent. The community is advised to remain vigilant and avoid interacting with unverified links.

data.title: Metaplanet announces opening of US headquarters in Miami
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Simon Gerovich, CEO of Metaplanet, a Japanese listed company that adopts a Bitcoin reserve strategy, announced on the X platform that the company has established its US headquarters in Miami. Metaplanet previously announced a financing plan of up to US$5.4 billion, intending to acquire a total of 210,000 BTC by the end of 2027.

data.title: Tim Draper: Bitcoin can hedge against excessive spending by the US government, and is expected to reach $250,000 this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Draper VC founder Tim Draper posted on the X platform that once the US government allows employees to conduct collective bargaining, it will be like driving a truck without brakes down the mountain, but Bitcoin can hedge the excessive spending of the US government.
Tim Draper believes that Bitcoin can still reach $250,000 in 2025, and the main factors driving the development of Bitcoin are: the market is generally optimistic about Trump's trade agreement, the regulatory framework expected by the industry is about to be introduced, and the Web3 application built on the Bitcoin blockchain continues to develop. Major banks are also adding Bitcoin to their products. Compared with other cryptocurrencies and stocks, Bitcoin has lower risks because people believe in Bitcoin, which also makes Bitcoin win the title of value storage.

data.title: Opinion: Ethereum is the birthplace of stablecoins and prediction markets, but the community lacks a competitive spirit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino posted on the X platform that Ethereum is the "birthplace" of stablecoins, risk-weighted assets, DeFi, NFT, decentralized social and prediction markets, but no one in the market seems to care about what Ethereum has done, and the Ethereum community sometimes lacks a competitive spirit.
However, with Ethereum's on-chain activity at an all-time high, Circle's listing pushing stablecoins into the mainstream, and X's cooperation with Polymarket, Ethereum is gradually finding a balance between creativity and competitive spirit.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) Price Faces Mini Squeeze On Bollinger Bands, Breakout Expected?
data.description:

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/07/stellar-xlm-price-faces-mini-squeeze-on-bollinger-bands-breakout-expected/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $25.2228 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 15 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 6, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$25.2228 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$15.8559 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.855 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$9.3668 million. Currently, ETH's total net inflow has reached US$694 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.40 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 3.11%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.327 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $47.8225 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF IBIT experiencing a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 6, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 47.8225 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of 31.8127 million US dollars. Currently, BITB's total net inflow in history has reached 1.972 billion US dollars.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of 22.7748 million US dollars. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached 11.438 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net outflow of 130 million US dollars. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached 48.65 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$125.582 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 6.05%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.24 billion.
